articles.title: Today's Tech Brief: The Pope, AI, and a Dash of Irony
articles.summary: The Pope's recent encyclical on artificial intelligence has raised eyebrows, with some parts seemingly written by AI itself. Let's dive into the story and explore the intersection of faith and technology.
articles.imageAlt: Image from theverge.com for Did the Pope use AI to write about the dangers of AI?

articles.title: Today's Markets Brief: SK Hynix crosses $1 trillion market cap on AI boom
articles.summary: SK Hynix has reached a $1 trillion market cap due to the AI boom, while Dow Jones Futures have risen after the S&P 500 and Nasdaq hit new highs.

articles.title: Today's AI Brief: Vatican Meets Silicon Valley
articles.summary: The Vatican invited Anthropic to the Pope's AI encyclical presentation, signaling an alliance between the Catholic church and Silicon Valley. We explore this and other AI news.
articles.imageAlt: Image from source article for Why the Vatican Invited Anthropic to the Pope’s AI Encyclical Presentation
articles.imageSourceTitle: Why the Vatican Invited Anthropic to the Pope’s AI Encyclical Presentation
